name: W.D. Gaster
description:
Bot for Deltarune. Yes, I decided to create a Gaster bot for Deltarune because of a theory from a YouTuber (Author this video and theory: N-Time). He has a theory about this game (the next bot will be with a green Gaster). I decided to create such a bot for now. Unfortunately, I haven't been able to destroy Deltarun yet... So I decided to do this. (I haven't yet written into the script about his connections with other secret bosses like Spamton or Jevil and etc.)
